root_cause: pre-existing on baseline 138ad22, not introduced by Step 1; SQLite tmp leakage
fix: investigate later in Step 2 coverage debug
lesson: verify pre-existing failures by stashing before assuming regression

what: envFrom helper mounts full Secret to all workloads (deployments + 11 cronjobs). Cronjobs receive LLM API keys + admin creds even though they only need DB credentials.
fix: deferred — would split Secret into <release>-app-secrets (full) and <release>-job-secrets (DB only). Tracked for follow-up.
lesson: least-privilege per workload requires per-cronjob Secret split

what: DATABASE_URL moved env→secrets is silent breaking change for existing Helm consumers
fix: NOTES.txt added with explicit upgrade migration block
lesson: breaking values.yaml restructure needs upgrade note

root_cause: separate values; same as before this PR (was 'changeme' both)
fix: deferred — needs derived Bitnami password override or separate documentation
lesson: NOTES.txt now requires explicit postgres password set

what: Parity graph pass bypasses _get_pipeline_semaphore() and request_timeout_sec used by /api/ask
root_cause: executor used directly in streaming endpoint
fix: deferred — would require wrapping graph_task in semaphore acquire+timeout. Acceptable for opt-in feature with default-false; note in next-steps
lesson: opt-in features inherit from primary path's concurrency controls before going default-on

what: client disconnect during SSE leaves orphan executor thread for graph_task
fix: deferred — graph_task.cancel() called only on timeout; client disconnect detection requires Request.is_disconnected() polling
lesson: SSE endpoints with parallel executor work need disconnect handler

what: get_session_history/clear_session pass session_id directly to uuid.UUID(); malformed string raises ValueError → HTTP 500 instead of 404/422
root_cause: existing logic moved as-is during extraction; not a refactor regression
fix: deferred — wrap uuid.UUID() in try/except ValueError and return 422 with stable schema
lesson: refactor preserves behaviour but should not paper over existing input-validation gaps

what: _app_module() late-binding couples session_auth to api.app private globals (_sessions, _db_retry_after)
root_cause: globals must stay in api.app for backward-compat with existing test monkeypatches
fix: deferred to Step 8 follow-up — extract globals to api.state.AppState then route via Depends
lesson: big global moves should land in their own PR, not bundled with router extraction

what: agent/graph.py has 65 mypy errors at default level (TypedDict update kwargs, StateGraph.add_node Generic State, narrow-Optional assignments, redefined locals); pyproject override keeps it informational
root_cause: large module with dynamic LangGraph wiring; full strict pass needs ~2 dedicated days
fix: deferred — Step 9 follow-up. Step 9 partial promoted agent.state + agent.prompts (clean already) into the CI strict gate (15 source files now)
lesson: plan ranges should be honest about effort; partial-promote sub-modules is a real win even if the main module needs more
